description.value: Aura moderate conjuration and transmutation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 14,400 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This crooked staff is made of mahogany and decorated with the bones of eidolons that jut out of the wood. It allows the use of the following spells: Lesser rejuvenate eidolon (1 charge) Unfetter (1 charge) Lesser evolution surge (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells lesser evolution surge, lesser rejuvenate eidolon, unfetter; Cost 7,200 gp.
